ADMTG_DGNS_CD 
LABEL: 
Admitting Diagnosis Code 
DESCRIPTION: The ICD-9/10-CM diagnosis code provided at the time of admission by the physician.

LONG NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_CD

CHAR

7
